name: X-Golf Pasadena
about: X-Golf Pasadena offers a high-tech indoor golf simulator experience featuring 8 simulator bays. The facility uses advanced camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors to provide players with accurate and realistic gameplay. Pricing is per bay, per hour, accommodating up to six people per bay, and is available for online booking. It is suitable for both casual play and serious practice, with options for leagues, lessons, and corporate events, complemented by an on-site restaurant and bar.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with unparalleled accuracy and realism
Flexible pricing model allows groups of up to 6 to play per bay
On-site restaurant and bar offer a complete entertainment experience
PGA-certified professional instruction available for skill improvement
Host to monthly national tournaments for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Tasty snacks, finger foods, appetizers, pizzas and more available
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails and wines

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs, but rental clubs are also available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted, but X-Golf Pasadena offers a full restaurant and bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes about 1 hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. For multiple players, it's recommended to book an additional hour for each player in the group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Pasadena welcomes children of all ages and is a suitable environment for families.
